title: polypodium × pinnatisectum
intro: Polypodium × pinnatisectum, also known as polypodium fern, is a hybrid plant species within the Polypodiaceae family, resulting from the cross between two different species of polypodium ferns. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polypodium × pinnatisectum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
